message.content: @startuml actor User participant "RosterOccupyController" as Controller #E6E6FA participant "RosterOccupBiz" as Biz #E6E6FA User ->> Controller : 根据申诉时间获取可占用班次\nactivate Controller note right of Controller: \n activate Controller Controller->>+Biz: 获取占用班次 Note left of biz:**业务逻辑处理**\n*1.* *查询数据库*: \ni)从排班表中查找临近三天的所有有效(未删除且状态为'已发布')的排班记录; ii).同时检索失败原因不为空的异常数据; rect rgb(240, 235 ,227 ) loop for each shift in shiftsList do parallel alt if hasOverlap(shift.timeRange,requestTime)&¬FinishedOrExpiredWithinTwoHoursAfterEndtime then calculateRemainingWorkHour()&&if remainingWorkinghourGreaterThanZero addShiftToResultCollection endif endAlt else continue next iteration without processing current item anymore since conditions aren't met so skip ahead directly
